overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a nighttime walk through a neon-lit futuristic city center. The player walks through wet streets reflecting colorful advertisements and neon signs, transitioning from an open plaza to a street lined with digital billboards and storefronts while light rain falls.

scene_state.functional_zone: open urban plaza with digital advertising screens

agents.ego_description: walking steadily through the wet plaza toward the central covered structure, passing a purple vending kiosk on the left

entered.detail: tall purple and white automated vending machine with illuminated product display
beige modern canopy structure with integrated lighting in the middle of the plaza
tall vertical digital billboard displaying a woman in a purple jacket
wet tiled ground reflecting neon lights and digital advertisements

segments.scene_description: The segment opens in a futuristic urban plaza at night, with wet pavement reflecting vibrant neon lights. A purple vending kiosk stands prominently on the left while tall digital billboards tower ahead. The player walks forward through the open space toward a central covered structure.

scene_state.functional_zone: plaza edge transitioning to multi-lane street

events.description: moving from the enclosed plaza area toward the open street with vehicle traffic and road barriers

agents.ego_description: navigating from the plaza toward the street, passing palm trees and approaching the road with traffic barriers

entered.detail: tall palm trees lining the edge of the plaza area
concrete and metal barriers separating pedestrian and vehicle areas
illuminated sign with 'El Guapo' text on a dark pedestal
large elevated transit way or building overpass spanning across the street ahead

segments.scene_description: The player moves from the central plaza toward the street edge, passing palm trees and concrete barriers. The El Guapo sign becomes visible on the right as the scene opens up to reveal the multi-lane road and an overhead transit structure in the distance.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered urban street under transit overpass

events.description: entering the covered area under the large building overpass with reduced sky visibility and artificial lighting
dark colored sedan drives past on the right side of the road

agents.ego_description: walking along the sidewalk next to the multi-lane road under the overpass, passing yellow road barriers

notable_agents.action: black sedan driving along the road from right to left

entered.detail: large bright pink and blue neon sign reading 'BRYCE CACHET' on a building facade
yellow and black striped metal barriers lining the edge of the sidewalk
elevated pedestrian walkway or building structure with illuminated windows

segments.scene_description: Walking under the massive overhead transit structure, the street becomes more enclosed with the Bryce Cachet neon sign visible ahead on the right. Yellow barriers line the sidewalk as vehicles pass by on the wet road, and the environment shifts to a more sheltered, urban canyon feel.

scene_state.functional_zone: neon-lit commercial street with storefronts in light rain

events.description: light rain begins to fall visibly, pedestrians open glowing umbrellas
passing directly by the Bryce Cachet storefront with bright pink neon illumination

agents.ego_description: walking along the wet sidewalk in light rain, passing pedestrians with glowing umbrellas and neon-lit storefronts

notable_agents.action: walking toward camera holding a glowing red umbrella

entered.detail: pedestrians carrying illuminated umbrellas with red and blue neon glow
tall street lamps with bright white light illuminating the rainy street

segments.scene_description: The final segment features walking through light rain past the Bryce Cachet storefront, with pedestrians carrying glowing neon umbrellas approaching from the opposite direction. The wet pavement creates vivid reflections of the pink and blue neon signs as the player continues down the illuminated commercial street.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person journey through a neon-drenched futuristic city, transitioning from an open urban plaza into a dense, rain-slicked commercial corridor. It begins by moving across wet pavement reflecting vibrant lights, passing a purple vending kiosk and towering digital billboards toward a central covered structure. As the camera advances toward the street edge, the space opens up past palm trees and concrete barriers to reveal a multi-lane road and the El Guapo sign. The scene then shifts into a more enclosed urban canyon as the camera passes under a massive overhead transit structure, flanked by yellow barriers and the Bryce Cachet neon sign. Finally, the movement continues through light rain past the storefront, where pedestrians with glowing neon umbrellas emerge amidst vivid pink and blue reflections on the shimmering ground.
